name: Kaya

secondary.name: Small Dagger
secondary.feature: Paired: +2 to primary weapon damage to targets within Melee range

inventory: A small bag of rocks and bones

inventory.name: Covenant of Observed Footsteps
inventory.author: Office of Adventuring Licences, Omens & Minor Observations

background.a: Grew up in a small house surrounded by deep forests. Was taught to feel and practice the connection to plants

As a small child, wandering and getting lost in the forest. After hours of anxious wandering, and the darkness getting closer, I sat down under a big oak tree and closed my eyes. After a while, it felt like the tree hugged me from the back. Suddenly I got a flash of a vision, like a golden lightning through the forest floor, showing me the way back home. Wandering back, I could feel like all the mushrooms surrounding me were chanting my name, showing me love on my way back.

Was close to drowning in a small lake. Sank deeper into the dark, the air had left my lungs. As my eyes were losing vision and I felt myself drift away, I heard a clear voice calling through the deep. It yelled at me to get up. Keep fighting, push myself towards the surface. As I tried, I lost strength again and kept sinking. Then I felt cold, scaled hands grab both my arms and forcefully pull me towards the surface. Next thing I know I’m lying on the shore, cold, shivering, and couching brown lake water. In that moment, I realized, I had so much more to accomplish in this lifetime.
The call of having a bigger purpose, needing to get something accomplished for the greater good of all beings.

That all life is sacred, everything in our world is magical and deserves respect. It becomes difficult in the moments that are about survival. Someone attacking you, needing to eat an animal to survive.
Well being and safety for all, and the want to discover the limits of our magical capacities.
My connection to all beings.
The mistake was leaving people I love behind when I needed to go out and see where the world takes me.

domainCards.name: Nature's Tongue
domainCards.text:
You can speak the language of the natural world. When you want to speak to the plants and animals around you, make an Instinct Roll (12). On a success, they'll give you the information they know. On a roll with Fear, their knowledge might be limited or come at a cost.

Additionally, before you make a Spellcast Roll while within a natural environment, you can spend a Hope to gain a +2 bonus to the roll.

domainCards.name: Vicious Entangle
domainCards.text:
Make a Spellcast Roll against a target within Far range. On a success, roots and vines reach out from the ground, dealing 1d8+1 physical damage and temporarily Restraining the target.

Additionally on a success, you can spend a Hope to temporarily Restrain another adversary within Very Close range of your target.

hopeFeature.name: Evolution
hopeFeature.text: Spend 3 Hope to transform into a Beastform without marking a Stress. When you do, choose one trait to raise by +1 until you drop out of that Beastform.

classFeatures.name: Beastform
classFeatures.text: Mark a Stress to magically transform into a creature of your tier or lower from the Beastform list. You can drop out of this form at any time. While transformed, you can't use weapons or cast spells from domain cards, but you can still use other features or abilities you have access to. Spells you cast before you transform stay active and last for their normal duration, and you can talk and communicate as normal. Additionally, you gain the Beastform's features, add their Evasion bonus to your Evasion, and use the trait specified in their statistics for your attack. While you're in a Beastform, your armor becomes part of your body and you mark Armor Slots as usual; when you drop out of a Beastform, those marked Armor Slots remain marked. If you mark your last Hit Point, you automatically drop out of this form.

classFeatures.name: Wildtouch
classFeatures.text: You can perform harmless, subtle effects that involve nature -- such as causing a flower to rapidly grow, summoning a slight gust of wind, or starting a campfire -- at will.

foundation.name: Clarity of Nature
foundation.text: Once per long rest, you can create a space of natural serenity within Close range. When you spend a few minutes resting within the space, clear Stress equal to your Instinct, distributed as you choose between you and your allies.

foundation.name: Regeneration
foundation.text: Touch a creature and spend 3 Hope. That creature clears 1d4 Hit Points.

ancestry.name: Quick Reactions
ancestry.text: Mark a Stress to gain advantage on a reaction roll.

ancestry.name: Celestial Trance
ancestry.text: During a rest, you can drop into a trance to choose an additional downtime move.

community.name: Lightfoot
community.text: Your movement is naturally silent. You have advantage on rolls to move without being heard.

name: Bob Näslös

inventory.name: Covenant of Observed Footsteps
inventory.author: Office of Adventuring Licences, Omens & Minor Observations

background.a: Bob was born into a goblin clan in the mines below a human city. The different goblin clans specialize in different trades to avoid conflict. But rivalry inevitably arises between them. The clan of Bob took on the kind of jobs wealthy humans wanted to keep in the shadows, such as lockpicking and thievery of all kinds. This required secrecy and finesse to avoid trouble. Blending in with humans was a necessary skills for all goblin, for they were often looked down upon.

The day a gang of goblins from a rival clan cut off Bobs nose as a warning. He had meddled to deep. However, he never found out their identities. All he remembers is a goblin with a large golden nose-ring with an embedded ruby. After this he lived in shame, and chose to leave his clan and his family.

domainCards.name: Pick And Pull
domainCards.text: You have advantage on action rolls to pick nonmagical locks, disarm nonmagical traps, or steal items from a target (either through stealth or by force).

domainCards.name: Uncanny Disguise
domainCards.text:
When you have a few minutes to prepare, you can mark a Stress to don the facade of any humanoid you can picture clearly in your mind. While disguised, you have advantage on Presence Rolls to avoid scrutiny.

Place a number of tokens equal to your Spellcast trait on this card. When you take an action while disguised, spend a token from this card. After the action that spends the last token is resolved, the disguise drops.

hopeFeature.name: Rogue's Dodge
hopeFeature.text: Spend 3 Hope to gain a +2 bonus to your Evasion until the next time an attack succeeds against you. Otherwise, this bonus lasts until your next rest.

classFeatures.name: Cloaked
classFeatures.text: Any time you would be Hidden, you are instead Cloaked. In addition to the benefits of the Hidden condition, while Cloaked you remain unseen if you are stationary when an adversary moves to where they would normally see you. After you make an attack or end a move within line of sight of an adversary, you are no longer Cloaked.

classFeatures.name: Sneak Attack
classFeatures.text:
When you succeed on an attack while Cloaked or while an ally is within Melee range of your target, add a number of d6s equal to your tier to your damage roll.

• Level 1 -> Tier 1
• Levels 2-4 -> Tier 2
• Levels 5-7 -> Tier 3
• Levels 8-10 -> Tier 4

foundation.name: Shadow Stepper
foundation.text: You can move from shadow to shadow. When you move into an area of darkness or a shadow cast by another creature or object, you can mark a Stress to disappear from where you are and reappear inside another shadow within Far range. When you reappear, you are Cloaked.

ancestry.name: Surefooted
ancestry.text: You ignore disadvantage on Agility Rolls.

ancestry.name: Danger Sense
ancestry.text: Once per rest, mark a Stress to force an adversary to reroll an attack against you or an ally within Very Close range.

community.name: Scoundrel
community.text: You have advantage on rolls to negotiate with criminals, detect lies, or find a safe place to hide.

portraitPrompt: A wiry goblin crouches in shadow, his noseless face split by a sly, scheming grin that hints at endless mischief. Large yellow eyes gleam with devious calculation beneath a drawn hood, while big pointy ears twitch toward every whisper. He wears a padded gambeson, its seams touched with faint muted plum, and a rosy blush of dusty red warms the folds of his hood. One hand steadies a shiny dagger, the other a hand crossbow, and stolen trinkets glint at his belt, betraying a lifetime of light-fingered, nightwalking habit. Comically large grin. Very evil. Literally has a grin from ear to ear. His nose has been cut-off leaving just two slits. Green skin.

name: Redneck

primary.name: Scepter
primary.feature: Versatile: This weapon can also be used with these statistics—Presence, Melee, d8.

inventory.name: Covenant of Observed Footsteps
inventory.author: Office of Adventuring Licences, Omens & Minor Observations

background.a: Berg kuperat landskap arga mellan berg tank avatar vi går pi styltor
Samt sedan Vi dvärgar fick bygga egen stylta med familj en samt sedan bygga vingar

domainCards.name: Mending Touch
domainCards.text:
You lay your hands upon a creature and channel healing magic to close their wounds. When you can take a few minutes to focus on the target you're helping, you can spend 2 Hope to clear a Hit Point or a Stress on them.

Once per long rest, when you spend this healing time learning something new about them or revealing something about yourself, you can clear 2 Hit Points or 2 Stress on them instead.

domainCards.name: Forceful Push
domainCards.text:
Make an attack with your primary weapon against a target within Melee range. On a success, you deal damage and knock them back to Close range. On a success with Hope, add a d6 to your damage roll.

Additionally, you can spend a Hope to make them temporarily Vulnerable.

hopeFeature.name: Life Support
hopeFeature.text: Spend 3 Hope to clear a Hit Point on an ally within Close range.

classFeatures.name: Prayer Dice
classFeatures.text: At the beginning of each session, roll a number of d4s equal to your subclass's Spellcast trait and place them on your character sheet in the space provided. These are your Prayer Dice. You can spend any number of Prayer Dice to aid yourself or an ally within Far range. You can use a spent die's value to reduce incoming damage, add to a roll's result after the roll is made, or gain Hope equal to the result. At the end of each session, clear all unspent Prayer Dice.

foundation.name: Wings of Light
foundation.text:
You can fly. While flying, you can do the following:

• Mark a Stress to pick up and carry another willing creature approximately your size or smaller.
• Spend a Hope to deal an extra 1d8 damage on a successful attack.

ancestry.name: Thick Skin
ancestry.text: When you take Minor damage, you can mark 2 Stress instead of marking a Hit Point.

ancestry.name: Increased Fortitude
ancestry.text: Spend 3 Hope to halve incoming physical damage.

community.name: Steady
community.text: You have advantage on rolls to traverse dangerous cliffs and ledges, navigate harsh environments, and use your survival knowledge.

name: Heliga Erik

primary.name: Scepter
primary.feature: Versatile: This weapon can also be used with these statistics—Presence, Melee, d8.

inventory.name: Covenant of Observed Footsteps
inventory.author: Office of Adventuring Licences, Omens & Minor Observations

background.a:
As a nomad, henrik travelled the lands to spread the light, guided by an inner voice. 
He stems from a group of holy missionaries that are set on a similair path.

One of Henriks first memories is when he was living as an orphan in a big city, abandoned from his parents that deemed his visions as crazy talk  till the point where he was kicked out on the street in the rain. A mysterious robed man stretched out his hand to Henrik and fed him alm. This man was a highly respected elder within the church that saw the boys strenght in an instant.

Henrik was faced with a crazed politician, henrik quickly saw the demonic possesion within the congressman. He was faced with letting the man corrupt the entire city, or slay him where he stands and face the consequence of being shunned by the city. Henrik followed his inner voice and with a mighty swing he cracked the skull of the demon. From that day on, he had to travel as a nomad to clear his name of sin and sspread the light. The church banished him to save face to the public, knowing the hardship they had put on Henrik.
Banished from the city and the church

Henrik believes in the light, and the guiding inner voice. The robed man taught him to trust it above all else, no matter the hardship. This often puts him in moral dilemmas where the guiding voice makes henrik do questionable choices for the greater "good". Like the murder of the congressman possessed by demonic forces.

domainCards.name: Mending Touch
domainCards.text:
You lay your hands upon a creature and channel healing magic to close their wounds. When you can take a few minutes to focus on the target you're helping, you can spend 2 Hope to clear a Hit Point or a Stress on them.

Once per long rest, when you spend this healing time learning something new about them or revealing something about yourself, you can clear 2 Hit Points or 2 Stress on them instead.

domainCards.name: Reassurance
domainCards.text: Once per rest, after an ally attempts an action roll but before the consequences take place, you can offer assistance or words of support. When you do, your ally can reroll their dice.

hopeFeature.name: Life Support
hopeFeature.text: Spend 3 Hope to clear a Hit Point on an ally within Close range.

classFeatures.name: Prayer Dice
classFeatures.text: At the beginning of each session, roll a number of d4s equal to your subclass's Spellcast trait and place them on your character sheet in the space provided. These are your Prayer Dice. You can spend any number of Prayer Dice to aid yourself or an ally within Far range. You can use a spent die's value to reduce incoming damage, add to a roll's result after the roll is made, or gain Hope equal to the result. At the end of each session, clear all unspent Prayer Dice.

foundation.name: Spirit Weapon
foundation.text: When you have an equipped weapon with a range of Melee or Very Close, it can fly from your hand to attack an adversary within Close range and then return to you. You can mark a Stress to target an additional adversary within range with the same attack roll.

foundation.name: Sparing Touch
foundation.text: Once per long rest, touch a creature and clear 2 Hit Points or 2 Stress from them.

ancestry.name: Luckbender
ancestry.text: Once per session, after you or a willing ally within Close range makes an action roll, you can spend 3 Hope to reroll the Duality Dice.

ancestry.name: Wings
ancestry.text: You can fly. While flying, you can mark a Stress after an adversary makes an attack against you to gain a +2 bonus to your Evasion against that attack.

community.name: Nomadic Pack
community.text: Add a Nomadic Pack to your inventory. Once per session, you can spend a Hope to reach into this pack and pull out a mundane item that's useful to your situation. Work with the GM to figure out what item you take out.

portraitPrompt: Religious fanatic, white robes, fairy pink wings, green details here and there, blonde long flowing hair, and a magical Queen fairy crown with jewelry, crazy eyes, androgynous male

name: Oore
inventory: A book you're trying to translate

inventory.name: Covenant of Observed Footsteps
inventory.author: Office of Adventuring Licences, Omens & Minor Observations

background.a: I was made by the people of a small town by the mountains to explore the potential of the nearby cave systems. I spent my life exploring and mapping them, memorizing them, and discovering their secrets. Over time my creators grew bored with me, stopped maintaining my mechanical stone body, as I continued to discover nothing that they seemed to desire. They were not interested in my oddly shaped stones, my pieces of stalachmite  or fossilised bits of species that dies long before our time. They didn't care for my meticoulous maps where any oddity was marked. So they left me to rust, let my stone joints crumble into dust as I use them. Without the purpose of which I was made, I wander aimless in the world, trying to make sense of it. Trying to map anything I see in hopes of learning how to find the ideal route out of my confusion at the world around me.

I squeezed myself through a small crevice, feeling the stone of my arms scrape against the stone of the cave wall. I tried to inch further and further, feeling a sense of adrenaline at the possibility of what may lie behind this uncomfortable passage. What wonders may be ahead, that only I have seen. But as the space around me grew smaller, I felt my excitement slowly turn into anxiety. The feeling deepened into stone-cold terror when I realised I could neither move forward or backward. I lay flat, on my stomach, frozen between floor an ceiling. . CONT

I am not useful anymore. I have not done my job. My findings are useless, my craft of no importance. My body is broken and nobody would ever care to mend it with so little return. My creators hurdled me out of my maproom, their words still in the air. I would never see that place again. I would never get to page through my personal altlases again,

domainCards.name: Bolt Beacon
domainCards.text: Make a Spellcast Roll against a target within Far range. On a success, spend a Hope to send a bolt of shimmering light toward them, dealing d8+2 magic damage using your Proficiency. The target becomes temporarily Vulnerable and glows brightly until this condition is cleared.

domainCards.name: Book Of Tyfar
domainCards.text:
Wild Flame: Make a Spellcast Roll against up to three adversaries within Melee range. Targets you succeed against take 2d6 magic damage and must mark a Stress as flames erupt from your hand.

Magic Hand: You conjure a magical hand with the same size and strength as your own within Far range.

Mysterious Mist: Make a Spellcast Roll (13) to cast a temporary thick fog that gathers in a stationary area within Very Close range. The fog heavily obscures this area and everything in it.

domainCards.name: Book Of Illiat
domainCards.text:
Slumber: Make a Spellcast Roll against a target within Very Close range. On a success, they're Asleep until they take damage or the GM spends a Fear on their turn to clear this condition.

Arcane Barrage: Once per rest, spend any number of Hope and shoot magical projectiles that strike a target of your choice within Close range. Roll a number of d6s equal to the Hope spent and deal that much magic damage to the target.

Telepathy: Spend a Hope to open a line of mental communication with one target you can see. This connection lasts until your next rest or you cast Telepathy again.

hopeFeature.name: Not This Time
hopeFeature.text: Spend 3 Hope to force an adversary within Far range to reroll an attack or damage roll.

classFeatures.name: Prestidigitation
classFeatures.text: You can perform harmless, subtle magical effects at will. For example, you can change an object's color, create a smell, light a candle, cause a tiny object to float, illuminate a room, or repair a small object.

classFeatures.name: Strange Patterns
classFeatures.text:
Choose a number between 1 and 12. When you roll that number on a Duality Die, gain a Hope or clear a Stress.

You can change this number when you take a long rest.

foundation.name: Prepared
foundation.text: Take an additional domain card of your level or lower from a domain you have access to.

foundation.name: Adept
foundation.text: When you Utilize an Experience, you can mark a Stress instead of spending a Hope. If you do, double your Experience modifier for that roll.

ancestry.name: Purposeful Design
ancestry.text: Decide who made you and for what purpose. At character creation, choose one of your Experiences that best aligns with this purpose and gain a permanent +1 bonus to it.

ancestry.name: Efficient
ancestry.text: When you take a short rest, you can choose a long rest move instead of a short rest move.

community.name: Low-Light Living
community.text: When you're in an area with low light or heavy shadow, you have advantage on rolls to hide, investigate, or perceive details within that area.

portraitPrompt: Han är skapad av metall och sten, gjord for att utforska grottor och skapa kartor. Hans mekanik är inte upprätthålld, och stenen i hans leder smulnar och faller isär. Hans ögon är stora och bleka. Han är liten och smal för att ta sig igenom små tunnlar. Hans hud har texturen av hackad sten. Han är 25 år gammal. Han är skygg, men snäll. Har sin outfit med saker att skapa kartor. Han är skallig med troll-aktiga öron.

request.prompt: A character portrait balancing atmosphere and concrete physical specifics equally. Skapad av metall och sten, gjord for att utforska grottor och skapa kartor av hans skapare. Hans mekanik är inte upprätthålld, och stenen i hans leder smulnar och faller isär. Hans ögon är stora och bleka. Han vill utforska världen, utforska varje liten vrå och få en överbild så han kan förstå hur allting hänger ihop så han kan relatera till andra levande ting och finna en plats i världen när han inte längre har en anledning att göra den enda sak han är skapad för. A character portrait balancing atmosphere and concrete physical specifics equally. Skapad av metall och sten, gjord for att utforska grottor och skapa kartor av hans skapare. Hans mekanik är inte upprätthålld, och stenen i hans leder smulnar och faller isär. Hans ögon är stora och bleka. Han är liten och smal för att ta sig igenom små tunnlar.. Hans hud har texturen av hackad sten. Han är ung vuxen. Han är skygg, men snäll. Han vill utforska världen, utforska varje liten vrå och få en överbild så han kan förstå hur allting hänger ihop så han kan relatera till andra levande ting och finna en plats i världen när han inte längre har en anledning att göra den enda sak han är skapad för.
